heading: Enlisted members: computation of years of service for voluntary retirement
label: 20604 Enlisted members: computation of years of service for voluntary retirement

children.heading: .—Years of Active Service
children.label: a .—Years of Active Service
children.text: For the purpose of determining whether an enlisted member of the Space Force may be retired under , the member’s years of service are computed by adding all active service in the armed forces.section 20603 of this title

children.heading: .—Reference to Section Excluding Counting of Certain Service Required to Be Made up
children.label: b .—Reference to Section Excluding Counting of Certain Service Required to Be Made up
children.text: Time required to be made up under may not be counted in computing years of service under subsection (a).section 972(a) of this title
